title: Spot Data Quality Issues in Preview Before Charting
summary: Most quality issues are visible in the first fifty rows if you know what to scan for.

content.summary: Most quality issues are visible in the first fifty rows if you know what to scan for.

body.text: Charting dirty data wastes time and credibility. Headers consistent? Dates parse? Amounts numeric?

body.alt: Person working with spreadsheets and notes
body.caption: Person working with spreadsheets and notes. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Headers consistent? Dates parse? Amounts numeric? Duplicate keys? Unexpected null spikes? Region codes mixed EN and DE?
Compare row count to prior export—large deltas warrant investigation before analysis.

items: Type mismatches show as text in numeric columns.
Duplicate keys inflate counts in bar charts.
Trailing spaces in categories split bars falsely.

body.text: Fix source when possible. Otherwise save exclusion rules and note impact on totals.
Quality preview becomes thirty-second habit that prevents deck disasters.
Datilio preview is built for this scan-before-chart discipline.

meta_description: Most quality issues are visible in the first fifty rows if you know what to scan for.
